# AgentHarness

> AgentHarness is a Python agent harness built around deterministic state machines,
> inspectable event streams, and offline replay.

## Home

- [Home](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/): pitch, 30-second why, and a FakeModel quickstart.

## Getting started

- [Install](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/getting-started/install/): install targets, source workflow, and optional provider extras.
- [Your first run](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/getting-started/first-run/): FakeModel, State.start, run, event iteration, and result inspection.
- [Record & replay](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/getting-started/record-replay/): save a trace, replay offline, and understand DivergenceError.

## Core concepts

- [The thesis](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/concepts/thesis/): decide, perform, reduce, and why purity buys production properties.
- [State & events](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/concepts/state-and-events/): immutable data algebra and JSON round-trips.
- [Effects & the runner](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/concepts/effects-and-runner/): where impure work happens and what gets recorded.
- [Determinism kit](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/concepts/determinism-kit/): Trace, replay, and divergence.

## Cookbook

- [Cookbook](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/): index of task-oriented recipes.
- [Unit-test an agent](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/unit-test-agent/): FakeModel with assertion helpers.
- [Record and replay offline](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/record-replay-offline/): trace persistence and offline replay.
- [Catch a regression](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/catch-regression/): use DivergenceError as a behavior-change alarm.
- [Define a tool with @tool](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/define-tool/): schema generation from Python type hints.
- [Multi-step tool use](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/multi-step-tool-use/): model tool call, tool result, final answer.
- [Inspect the event log](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/inspect-event-log/): stream typed run events.
- [Swap providers](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/swap-providers/): keep agent code stable across model adapters.
- [Run async](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/run-async/): async run and stream APIs.
- [Persist and diff traces](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/persist-diff-traces/): traces as plain JSONL artifacts.
- [Bring your own model](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/cookbook/bring-your-own-model/): implement the Model protocol.

## Providers

- [Anthropic](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/providers/anthropic/): AnthropicModel usage behind an optional extra; illustrative only.

## Guides

- [Testing agents](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/guides/testing-agents/): FakeModel, assertions, and a pytest-shaped example.
- [Tools with @tool](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/guides/tools/): tool schema generation and direct callability.

## Reference

- [Core API](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/reference/core/): mkdocstrings reference for agentharness_core.
- [AgentHarness API](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/reference/agentharness/): mkdocstrings reference for agentharness.
- [Contrib API](https://aafre.github.io/agentharness/reference/contrib/): mkdocstrings reference for agentharness_contrib.
